ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modernization_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modernization project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the modernization project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in_progress, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modernization_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated modernization project */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "budget_estimate" REAL /* Budget estimate for the fiscal year */,
  "revised_estimate" REAL /* Revised estimate for the fiscal year */,
  "actual_expenditure" REAL /* Actual expenditure for the fiscal year */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in budget estimate over the previous fiscal year */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget allocation (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES modernization_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year (e.g., 2017-18) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_budget_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record in budget history */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated modernization project */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "original_budget" REAL /* Original budget allocated for the project */,
  "revised_budget" REAL /* Revised budget after adjustments */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the budget change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_budget_history_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_budget_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES modernization_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated modernization project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure report */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount spent */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES modernization_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget allocation */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or justification */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_review_comments_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_review_comments_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_id") REFERENCES budget_allocations ("allocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., budget analyst, project manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated modernization project */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the evaluation (e.g., successful, needs review) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, in_progress, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_evaluations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES modernization_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget forecast */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated modernization project */,
  "forecast_year" TEXT /* Year for which the budget is projected */,
  "projected_budget" REAL /* Projected budget amount */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Justification for the projected budget */,
  "forecast_status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_forecasts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES modernization_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "project_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
